ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health metric */,
  "trend" REAL /* Trend of the health metric (year-over-year change) */,
  "national_rank" TEXT /* National ranking of the health metric */,
  "LMIC_decile" TEXT /* Decile ranking within LMICs */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was recorded */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of health metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the metric was updated */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_LMIC_decile FOREIGN KEY ("LMIC_decile") REFERENCES LMIC_deciles ("decile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region in which the country is located */,
  "LMIC_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the country is a LMIC */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Health expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the country data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Average GDP per capita of the region */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Average health expenditure as a percentage of GDP in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the region data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "LMIC_deciles" (
  "decile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decile rank */,
  "decile_rank" TEXT /* Rank within the decile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the decile */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the decile */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Average GDP per capita of the decile */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Average health expenditure as a percentage of GDP in the decile */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the decile data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the health metrics were recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health metric */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health metric for the year */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the metric value compared to the previous year */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the trend data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health metric */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "rank" TEXT /* National rank of the health metric */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the rank data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_national_ranks_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_national_ranks_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_national_ranks_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the health metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the health metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health metric */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health metric */,
  "entered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered the data */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was entered */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data entry */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the data entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data entry (e.g., pending review, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_entered_by FOREIGN KEY ("entered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
